title: Sword of the Jungle applies Atk plus three and Hit plus five while equipped

plan.title: Sword of the Jungle applies Atk plus three and Hit plus five while equipped
plan.summary: Equip Sword of the Jungle to a modifier-zero primary creature, run a battle, and verify the printed Hit and Atk bonuses.

notes: Use test_primary_creature_mod_0 so the Hit and Atk bonuses come only from Sword of the Jungle.

steps: Player 1 plays Sword of the Jungle and equips it to their primary creature.
Run a follow-up battle with the equipped creature attacking.
Inspect the resolved hit roll modifier and damage dealt.

expectedAssertions.label: Attack damage includes the +3 Atk bonus
Sword of the Jungle remains equipped/on field

manualVerification: Confirm both modifiers apply only while Sword of the Jungle remains equipped.
riskNotes: Uses battle output for Hit and Atk bonuses.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate Sword of the Jungle Hit/Atk equip modifier.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
